title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・立ちはだかる絶壁

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's tremendous effort at the spring
Tenno Sho draws a new wave of devoted fans to
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After watching her race, Air Groove suggests
Kitasan Black and Brusquement finally settle their
score at the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Satono Diamond takes second place
in an incredibly tight race in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Massive walls bar their respective paths. Next up
for Kitasan Black is the Takarazuka Kinen.
